# `!facts`

**Category:** control

Gather system facts (OS, architecture, distribution) about the target and expose them as `jet_*` variables for subsequent tasks. Must run before any `jet_*` variable is used.

## Examples

```yaml
- !facts
  name: gather system facts
```
